fix_instructions.Analytics Agent: Check API connection and credentials in GitHub Secrets → go to Settings → Secrets → verify ANALYTICS_API_KEY and ANALYTICS_API_SECRET
fix_instructions.Competitor Spy Agent: Update competitor video analysis script to handle latest API changes → go to GitHub → update competitor_spy.py
fix_instructions.SEO Optimizer Agent: Verify SEO update rules and apply missing updates → go to SEO settings → review and apply pending updates
fix_instructions.Revenue Tracker Agent: Verify YouTube API connection and credentials in GitHub Secrets → go to Settings → Secrets → verify YOUTUBE_API_KEY and YOUTUBE_API_SECRET
fix_instructions.Video Reviewer Agent: Initialize Video Reviewer agent by setting up video review criteria → go to Video Reviewer settings → set up review criteria
